Market estimate; confirm with supplier quotation

selections.selection_rationale: PA12 multilayer is the industry-standard material for automotive diesel fuel supply lines per SAE J2260. Rilsan BESNO TL is widely OEM-approved. EVOH barrier layer minimizes hydrocarbon permeation per LP.7A005. Conductive inner layer addresses SAE J1645 static charge dissipation. Temperature range -40 to +150C covers PR-005 requirement. Excellent diesel and bio-blend resistance.

PA12 multilayer selected for return line consistency with feed line (COMP-01). Same permeation barrier and ESD requirements apply. 10x8mm OD/ID with 1mm wall provides adequate burst margin. Rubber hose section noted in hint but PA12 preferred for dimensional control; rubber transition at engine interface to be evaluated during routing design.

Fuel damper sourced from Nobel Auto (per CTS). Housing material assumed aluminum die-cast (AlSi9Cu3) based on industry practice for fuel pulsation dampers at 4.5 bar working pressure. Internal diaphragm likely FKM or NBR — supplier-defined. Actual material to be confirmed via supplier IMDS submission. ELV/REACH compliant for aluminum alloys.
